# Arithmetic → Absolute Subtract

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Arithmetic → Absolute Subtract

Absolute Subtract

Instruction Type and Width        Instruction description
                                  Performs subtraction and absolute value between two sources.
                                  The sources are either 8-bit or 16-bit wide. The results are 16-bit
Vector Absolute Subtract
                                  and packed into 32-bit or 40-bit destination determined by the
                                  vector register type.
